globalNews.title: Earthquake is devastating blow to Venezuela at time of uncertainty
globalNews.summary: The twin quakes come less than six months after Venezuela's then-leader Nicolás Maduro was seized by US forces.

globalNews.title: Aerial footage reveals destruction in coastal Venezuela
globalNews.summary: Multi-storey buildings have collapsed in La Guaira following two major earthquakes on Wednesday.

globalNews.title: UN pauses Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan after cargo ship attacked
globalNews.summary: The ship was reportedly struck by an "unknown projectile" near Oman but no casualties were reported.

globalNews.title: Christmas market attacker jailed for life for murdering six in Germany
globalNews.summary: A nine-year-old and five women were killed when Taleb Al-Abdulmohsen drove into the market in 2024.

globalNews.title: Senior Ukrainian intelligence official jailed for life for spying for Russia
globalNews.summary: Col Dmytro Kozyura agreed to share state secrets and systematically disclosed classified information, prosecutors say.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Framework Ventures raises $400M to invest beyond crypto: Report
cryptoNews.summary: Framework Ventures raises $400 million fourth fund as it expands into AI, robotics and energy while reportedly planning to continue crypto investments.

cryptoNews.title: Hyperliquid added to Singapore's Investor Alert List
cryptoNews.summary: Singapore’s financial regulator added Hyperliquid to its Investor Alert List, as a reminder that the decentralized exchange was not licensed in the region.

cryptoNews.title: Australian regulator extends no-action period for crypto licensing
cryptoNews.summary: Australia’s financial regulator extended temporary enforcement relief for digital asset businesses until Sept. 30 as firms transition into the country’s licensing system.

cryptoNews.title: AscendEX withdrawal complaints mount as ZachXBT questions reserves
cryptoNews.summary: Multiple users reported delayed AscendEX withdrawals after ZachXBT flagged potential liquidity issues and urged the exchange to explain its reserves.

aiNews.title: Early Bird pricing ends tonight for TechCrunch Founder Summit
aiNews.summary: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026. Early Bird pricing ends today, at 11:59 p.m. PT, after which rates increase. Register now.

aiNews.title: The White House is asking OpenAI to slow roll the release of its new model over safety concerns
aiNews.summary: OpenAI reportedly plans to share its newest model, GPT 5.6, with a select group of partners instead of with the broader public. The reason: the Trump administration told it to.

aiNews.title: Patronus AI lands $50M to build ‘digital worlds’ that stress-test AI agents
aiNews.summary: Agent-testing startup Patronus AI, founded by former Meta AI researchers, is experiencing nearly insatiable demand, its investor says.

aiNews.title: Anthropic’s Claude is winning over paid consumers, a market owned by ChatGPT
aiNews.summary: Despite ChatGPT's commanding market lead, consumers who pay for AI have been increasingly choosing Anthropic's Claude, data shows.

aiNews.title: General Intuition’s $2.3B bet that video games can train AI agents for the real world
aiNews.summary: General Intuition has raised $320 million to scale AI trained on millions of hours of gameplay, betting action data can help AI develop something closer to human intuition.

economicCalendar.description: Monthly jobs report - employment and wage data
